name_en: 👄FENDI New imported leather clutch, zip closure, featuring gold metal Fendi Roma lettering. Suede fabric lining, gold and silver mixed-finish metal hardware. Equipped with double handles, one removable leather handle and the other a tortoiseshell-effect organic glass chain handle with a large metal O'Lock logo, can be carried by hand or underarm. Model: FD8068, Dimensions: 32*5*11cm
